source_pdfs: 473-手机浏览-动漫线稿内容一样-1.pdf
473-手机浏览-动漫线稿内容一样-2.pdf

pose_families.label: 正立/基础解剖站姿
learned_anatomy: Head, rib cage, pelvis, knees, and feet stack on a clear vertical center line.
Muscle lines use darker outside contours and lighter construction cross-contours.
Knees, ankles, deltoids, pectorals, pelvis, and abdomen are drawn as separate readable forms.
pose_families.live2d_use: Primary source pose for model build, texture cutting, and default idle stance.

pose_families.label: 侧身轮廓
learned_anatomy: Side view is driven by chest mass, pelvis mass, and knee offset rather than by a flat vertical line.
Rib cage and pelvis are offset in depth; spine curve is visible through neck, chest, waist, and hip landmarks.
Arms crossing or resting near the torso require occlusion layers over the chest and abdomen.
pose_families.live2d_use: Use as an angle target for ParamBodyAngleX and ParamAngleX, not as a full replacement for front art.

pose_families.label: S 曲线重心/姿态摆动
learned_anatomy: Weight-bearing leg stays more vertical; free leg bends or crosses the center line.
Pelvis tilt and shoulder tilt oppose each other, creating a readable S curve.
Waist compression appears on the loaded side; the stretched side shows longer oblique and rib lines.
pose_families.live2d_use: Good for idle variations, breathing plus hip sway, and soft body-angle motion.

pose_families.label: 举臂/抱头/手臂越过头顶
learned_anatomy: Raised arms lift and rotate the scapula and deltoid cap; armpit lines stretch upward.
Pectoral or breast forms shift upward and inward when the upper arm crosses the head.
Elbows and wrists need independent rotation pivots; a single arm layer is not enough.
pose_families.live2d_use: Requires split upper arm, lower arm, hand, deltoid cover, and armpit/shoulder correction layers.

pose_families.label: 单腿平衡/舞蹈姿态
learned_anatomy: The standing hip sits higher or locks under the rib cage; the lifted leg creates strong pelvis rotation.
Foot contact and ankle angle communicate balance; the free foot is smaller or lighter when pulled back.
Core line tilts opposite the raised knee to keep the pose balanced.
pose_families.live2d_use: Use as pose preset or motion target. Large knee lift should be an alternate pose, not only a slider.

pose_families.label: 跪坐/蹲伏/低姿态
learned_anatomy: Torso compresses over pelvis; abdomen folds and rib cage overlaps hip or thigh.
Thigh and calf shapes broaden because of foreshortening; knee becomes a major silhouette landmark.
Hands often become support points, so wrist and palm layers need ground-contact variants.
pose_families.live2d_use: Better as separate motion/pose artwork. A standing front model cannot naturally become a full kneel.

pose_families.label: 弓步/战斗/奔跑
learned_anatomy: Front leg and rear leg separate into opposing diagonals; pelvis rotates toward the action line.
Shoulder line counters the pelvis line, especially in punches, running, and weapon poses.
Motion reads through long curves from head to foot, then through shorter muscle compression marks.
pose_families.live2d_use: Good for motion clips if limbs are separate. Extreme foreshortening needs alternate art layers.

pose_families.label: 跳跃/腾空/大扭转
learned_anatomy: Center of mass floats between chest and pelvis; limbs fan outward to show force and direction.
Torso twist changes which shoulder, chest side, and hip side are visible.
Line weight emphasizes the leading side of the body and lets trailing limbs become lighter.
pose_families.live2d_use: Use for special motions or expression poses. Do not expect a single frontal rig to cover all of this cleanly.
